intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0 minutes of work done. 54 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting strong. 4 reps to go. The first one sets your standard for the rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1: 112% for 8:00. Breathing will be labored by minute 2. That's normal.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: After this recovery, you have 8min at 112%. One interval at a time. Focus here first.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 8:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First interval: 8:00 at 108-112%. Settle in, don't overcook it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 55% FTP, Seated. 4:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 18 minutes of work done. 42 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/4. You're 34% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/4. 112% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/4. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 34% complete. Rep 2/4. Fatigue is real — hold form. 112%, 95-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/1. 45-55% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 46% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 46% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 4:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 53% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 112% for 8:00. Next up: 4:00 recovery, then 8min at 112%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 53% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 53% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 53% done. 112% for 8:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 65% done. 0 intervals left. 18 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 24min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 65% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 18 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last one. Your body is lying — you have more. Prove it. Then you can rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 8:00 at 112%. Then 10min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep! 8:00 at 112%. Leave nothing in reserve. You'll be cooling down in 10 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Same power as last time, but you're way more tired. Progressive overload! *cries in watts*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 112% × 8:00. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 54 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 32min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 84% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 84% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 84% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
